apply: Students will be able to classify animals into their respective phyla based on their characteristics.
Students will be able to identify and describe the different types of body symmetry in various animal species.
Students will be able to explain the adaptations of different animal phyla to their environments.
Students will be able to identify and explain the different types of coelom in various animal species.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the characteristics of different animal phyla and identify their relationships.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the different types of body symmetry and their functions.
Students will be able to explain the evolutionary adaptations of different animal phyla.
Students will be able to analyze the importance of coelom in animal body structure and function.
remember: Students will be able to recall the major characteristics of the animal kingdom.
Students will be able to list the different phyla of animals.
Students will be able to describe the main features of the different types of body symmetry.
Students will be able to explain the concept of coelom and its types.
understand: Students will be able to explain the importance of classification of animals.
Students will be able to describe the characteristics of the main animal phyla.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the different types of body symmetry.
Students will be able to explain the different types of coelom and their functions.

ncert_objectives: To understand the characteristics of the animal kingdom and its classification.
To describe the main features of different types of body symmetry.
To explain the concept of coelom and its types.
To classify animals into their respective phyla based on their characteristics.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and describe the different types of animal phyla.
To explain the importance of classification of animals.
To compare and contrast the different types of body symmetry.
To identify and explain the different types of coelom in various animal species.
